hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="biome.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts lefthook.yml .eslintrc eslint.config .prettierrc .env .env.local .env.production .claude/settings.json"; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE" in *$p*) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is protected. Fix code, not config." >&2; exit 2;; esac; done'

bash -c 'if [ "${MCP_STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; export MCP_STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE=1; if [ -d test ] && ls test/*.test.ts 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run --reporter=dot 2>&1 | tail -30; fi'
